title: thlaspi cepaeifolium subsp. rotundifolium
intro: Thlaspi cepaeifolium subsp. rotundifolium, also known as the 'Turnip Cress', is a perennial plant species within the Brassicaceae family. It has been utilized for its medicinal properties, including its ability to act as a diuretic, expectorant, and anti-inflammatory agent. The health benefits of this plant include its potential to support respiratory health, aid in the treatment of kidney issues, and exhibit antimicrobial properties. The herbal preparations of Thlaspi cepaeifolium subsp. rotundifolium typically involve infusions, decoctions, or tinctures, which can be consumed to harness its medicinal and health benefits.
